name: Alt Text Generator
description: Generate descriptive alt text for images from descriptions. Export as JSON or CSV.
longDescription: Describe your images or paste filenames with descriptions, and get well-crafted, accessible alt text for each one. Batch process multiple images at once. Export results as JSON or CSV for easy integration into your projects.
author: vibedepot

name: Changelog Writer
description: Turn git diffs and commit lists into clean, user-facing changelogs.
longDescription: Paste a git diff, commit log, or list of changes and get a polished user-facing changelog. Choose from Keep a Changelog, conventional commits, or bullet-point formats. Perfect for release notes and version updates.
author: vibedepot

name: Contract Summarizer
description: Get plain-English summaries of contracts with key terms, obligations, and red flags.
longDescription: Paste contract or legal document text and get a clear plain-English breakdown. Identifies key terms, obligations for each party, important dates, financial terms, and potential red flags. Not legal advice — a comprehension aid.
author: vibedepot

name: CSV Analyzer
description: Paste CSV data and ask questions in plain English. Get summaries, trends, and anomalies.
longDescription: Paste CSV data and ask questions about it in plain English. AI analyzes your data to find summaries, trends, anomalies, and insights without writing any code. See column stats, distributions, and get answers about your dataset.
author: vibedepot

name: Email Writer
description: AI-powered email drafting assistant. Describe your email and get a polished draft instantly.
longDescription: Email Writer uses AI to help you draft professional, casual, or formal emails in seconds. Simply describe what you want to say, pick a tone, and get a polished draft ready to send. Save drafts for later and use streaming for real-time generation. Supports multiple AI providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, and Gemini.
author: vibedepot

name: File Summarizer
description: Paste document text and get a concise summary with key points extracted.
longDescription: Paste the text content of any document, article, or report and get a clear, concise summary with key points, main arguments, and important details extracted. Choose summary length: brief, standard, or detailed. Save summaries for reference.
author: vibedepot

name: Job Description Scorer
description: Score your resume against job descriptions with gap analysis and tailored bullet suggestions.
longDescription: Paste a job description and your resume text to get an instant match score, detailed gap analysis highlighting missing skills, and AI-generated tailored bullet points you can add to your resume. Save analyses for different positions.
author: vibedepot

name: Local Chat History
description: A persistent AI chat that saves every conversation locally.
longDescription: Chat with AI and keep every conversation saved locally on your machine. Create multiple conversation threads, search through past messages, and continue where you left off. All data stays on your device — your own private chat log.
author: vibedepot

name: Meeting Notes Cleaner
description: Clean up messy meeting notes into structured summaries with decisions, actions, and owners.
longDescription: Paste in raw transcript text or messy bullet notes from any meeting. AI extracts and organizes key decisions, action items with owners, and a concise summary. Copy the cleaned notes to clipboard instantly.
author: vibedepot

name: Prompt Lab
description: Test and iterate on AI prompts with variables. Compare results side-by-side.
longDescription: A prompt engineering workbench. Write system prompts with {{variables}}, test them with different inputs, and compare results. Save prompt templates and test sets locally. Perfect for iterating on AI prompts before deploying them.
author: vibedepot

name: Regex Builder
description: Describe what to match in plain English, get a working regex with test cases.
longDescription: Describe your pattern matching needs in plain English and get a working regular expression with test cases and a human-readable explanation. Test the regex against sample strings in real-time. Save useful patterns for later.
author: vibedepot

name: Research Briefer
description: Enter a topic and get a structured research briefing with key findings and analysis.
longDescription: Enter any topic and get a comprehensive, structured research briefing. AI synthesizes knowledge into an organized report with background, key findings, different perspectives, and actionable takeaways. Save briefings for reference.
author: vibedepot

name: SQL Query Writer
description: Describe what data you want in plain English, get a production-ready SQL query.
longDescription: Turn natural language into production-ready SQL queries. Describe the data you need, optionally provide your schema, and get a well-formatted query with explanation. Supports PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite dialects. Save queries for reuse.
author: vibedepot

name: Story World Builder
description: Build persistent fictional worlds with characters, locations, and lore.
longDescription: Create and manage rich fictional worlds for your stories, games, or creative projects. Add characters, locations, factions, and lore entries. AI helps expand on your ideas, find connections, and generate new content that fits your world. Everything is stored locally.
author: vibedepot

name: Tone Rewriter
description: Rewrite any text in your chosen tone — formal, casual, bold, empathetic, and more.
longDescription: Paste any text and select your desired tone. AI instantly rewrites it while preserving the original meaning. Choose from formal, casual, bold, empathetic, humorous, or concise tones. Copy results to clipboard with one click.
author: vibedepot

name: Tweet Thread Expander
description: Turn Twitter/X threads into polished long-form blog posts.
longDescription: Paste raw tweet thread text and get a polished, well-structured blog post. AI expands on the ideas, adds transitions, and creates a cohesive narrative from fragmented tweets. Copy the result or save for later editing.
author: vibedepot
